evals.prompt: I want Claude to auto-format my files with prettier after it edits them
evals.expected_output: A PostToolUse hook with Edit|Write matcher that runs prettier on the edited file via subprocess.run().

evals.prompt: Can you set up a hook that blocks Claude from deleting any files? Like if it tries to run rm or delete stuff I want it stopped
evals.expected_output: A PreToolUse hook on Bash that inspects the command for rm/delete patterns using Python string or regex matching, exits 2 to block.

evals.prompt: I want an AI check that makes sure Claude actually finished everything before stopping, not just giving up halfway
evals.expected_output: A Stop hook using prompt or agent type that evaluates task completion with stop_hook_active handling.

evals.prompt: I want to send a message to my team's Slack channel whenever Claude finishes working on something. Our webhook URL is https://hooks.slack.com/services/T0123/B456/xyz789
evals.expected_output: An HTTP hook on the Stop event that POSTs to the Slack webhook URL, or a command hook that uses urllib.request to POST.

evals.prompt: every time context gets compacted I lose track of what branch I'm on and what I was working on. can you make it so that info gets re-injected automatically?
evals.expected_output: A SessionStart hook with compact matcher that uses subprocess to run git branch/status and re-injects context back into the session.

evals.prompt: I want to auto-approve all Read and Glob operations so Claude doesn't keep asking me for permission on those. But still ask for everything else.
evals.expected_output: A PermissionRequest hook with Read|Glob matcher that returns hookSpecificOutput with behavior: allow.

evals.prompt: I need to log every single bash command Claude runs to a file for compliance. Include timestamps.
evals.expected_output: A PostToolUse hook with Bash matcher that extracts the command and appends it with a Python datetime timestamp to a log file.
